tiktok_script:
HOOK (0-8 sec): "It's Free Win Friday — and today I'm giving you the exact checklist I wish I had when I started building passive income."

BEAT 1 (8-30 sec): "Most people scroll past passive income content because they don't know where to start. There are too many options, too much noise. So I built a 38-step checklist — 8 pages — that sequences everything in the right order. Not random tips. A real roadmap."

BEAT 2 (30-55 sec): "And here's the thing — in an economy where everything costs more and one paycheck feels less safe than it used to, building even one small additional income stream changes your options. It changes how you think. It changes what you say yes and no to."

BEAT 3 (55-75 sec): "This checklist is completely free. No subscription, no upsell. Just 38 steps you can start working through today. Text on screen: link in bio. Go grab it right now — it takes about 30 seconds."

CTA (75-85 sec): "Link is in the bio. Free Win Friday. Go. https://smarterhustleacademy.com/start"
